zh.lifeSummary: 當Elizabeth Wilson於1557年1月出生在英國武斯特斯爾查阿德斯利 科比特時，她的父親Thomas Wilson38歲，母親Joanna Hicks25歲。她於1579年4月26日與Edward Griffin在英國英格蘭瓦維其可爾考文垂霍利 特利尼迪 邱奇結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1629年3月4日在英國英格蘭瓦維其可爾索利爾享年72歲，埋葬在澳洲劍橋大學默里 素斯 威爾斯利特。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Elizabeth Wilson于1557年1月出生在英国武斯特斯爾查阿德斯利 科比特时，她的父亲Thomas Wilson38岁，母亲Joanna Hicks25岁。她于1579年4月26日与Edward Griffin在英国英格兰瓦維其可爾考文垂霍利 特利尼迪 邱奇结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于1629年3月4日在英国英格兰瓦維其可爾索利爾享年72岁，埋葬在澳大利亚劍橋大學默里 素斯 威爾斯利特。

nameMeanings.name: Wilson
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: from the Middle English personal name Will + patronymic -son ‘son of Will’. Will was a very common medieval short form of William . This surname is also very common among African Americans.

variants.name: Will
meanings: English: from the Middle English personal name Will, a short form of William . This surname is now commonly found in Scotland, in Aberdeenshire, Angus, and Kincardineshire.

English: topographic name for someone who lived by a spring or stream, from Middle English wel, wel(l)e, wille, in a southwestern dialect form. This surname is found predominantly in the south and southwestern parts of the country. Compare Well 1.
English: nickname from Middle English iwil, wil(l)e ‘agreeable, pleasing’.

nameMeanings.name: Elizabeth
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: The usual spelling of   Elisabeth   in English. It is recorded in the medieval period, but was made popular by being borne by  Queen Elizabeth I  of England (  1533–1603 ). In the 20th century it again became extremely fashionable, partly because it was the name of  Elizabeth Bowes-Lyon  (  1900–2002 ), who in  1936  became Queen Elizabeth as the wife of King George VI, and after his death in  1952  achieved great public affection as Queen Mother for nearly half a century. Even more influentially, it is the name of her daughter  Queen Elizabeth II  (  b. 1926 ).

variants.name: Elisabeth
meanings: The spelling of Elizabeth used in the Authorized Version of the New Testament, and in most modern European languages. This was the name of the mother of John the Baptist (Luke 1:60). Etymologically, the name means ‘God is my oath’, and is therefore identical with Elisheba, the name of the wife of Aaron according to the genealogy at Exodus 6:23. The final element seems to have been altered by association with Hebrew shabbāth ‘Sabbath’.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

historicEvents.title: State Lottery
historicEvents.description: A State Lottery was recorded in 1569. The tickets were sold at St. Paul's Cathedral in London.

historicEvents.title: The First English Colony is Established in America
historicEvents.description: England established its first colony in North America in 1585 as a way to generate additional wealth. The colony was named Virginia, after the virgin Queen Elizabeth I.

historicEvents.title: Elizabeth I Signs Death Warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots
historicEvents.description: Elizabeth I signed the death warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots, on February 1, 1587, as she was found guilty of plotting to assasinate Elizabeth. Mary, Queen of Scots, was beheaded at Fotheringhay Castle in England on February 8, 1587.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Elizabeth I.org - Mary Queen of Scots

historicEvents.title: The Honourable East India Company
historicEvents.description: The Honourable East India Company, a British joint-stock company, was established in 1600 for trade in the Indian Ocean region. At its height, the British East India Company had a private army which was twice the size of the British Army, ruled large sections of India, and revenues in the millions.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Historic UK - The East India Company

historicEvents.title: The Pilgrims Board the Mayflower
historicEvents.description: "The Pilgrims boarded the Mayflower in search of religious freedom in the New World in September 1620. The Mayflower set sail from Plymouth, England, with 102 passengers, 40 of whom called themselves ""Saints."" After two stormy months at sea, the ship reached the New World. Nearly half of the group died during their first winter due to malnutrition and the harsh New England winter."

en.lifeSummary: When Elizabeth Wilson was born in January 1557, in Chaddesley Corbett, Worcestershire, England, her father, Thomas Wilson, was 38 and her mother, Joanna Hicks, was 25. She married Edward Griffin on 26 April 1579, in Holy Trinity Church, Coventry, Warwickshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 1 daughter. She died on 4 March 1629, in Solihull, Warwickshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 72, and was buried in Penrith, New South Wales, Australia.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Elizabeth Wilson est née en janvier 1557, à Chaddesley Corbett, Worcestershire, Angleterre, son père, Thomas Wilson, avait 38 ans et sa mère, Joanna Hicks, avait 25 ans. Elle a épousé Edward Griffin le 26 avril 1579, à Holy Trinity Church, Coventry, Warwickshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée le 4 mars 1629, à Solihull, Warwickshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 72 ans, et a été enterrée à Penrith, New South Wales, Australie.

de.lifeSummary: Als Elizabeth Wilson im Januar 1557 in Chaddesley Corbett, Worcestershire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Thomas Wilson 38 und ihre Mutter Joanna Hicks 25. Sie hat am 26. April 1579 in Holy Trinity Church, Coventry, Warwickshire, England, United Kingdom Edward Griffin geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Sie starb am 4. März 1629 im Alter von 72 Jahren in Solihull, Warwickshire, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Penrith, New South Wales, Australien begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Elizabeth Wilson è nata il nel gennaio 1557 nel Chaddesley Corbett, Worcestershire, England, sua padre, Thomas Wilson, aveva 38 anni e sua madre, Joanna Hicks, aveva 25 anni. Lei sposato Edward Griffin il 26 aprile 1579, nel Holy Trinity Church, Coventry, Warwickshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 1 figlia. Morì il 4 marzo 1629, nel Solihull, Warwickshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 72 anni, e fu sepolta a Penrith, New South Wales, Australia.

ja.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Wilsonが1557年1月にイギリスウオルセステルシュアイアチャッドエスリー コルベットで生まれた時，父Thomas Wilsonは38歳，母Joanna Hicksは25歳であった。1579年4月26日にイギリスイギリスワーウィクシュアイアコベントリーホーリー トリニトイ チャーチでEdward Griffinと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1629年3月4日にイギリスイギリスワーウィクシュアイアソリハルで72歳で死去し，オーストラリアニュー ソウス ワレスペンリスにて埋葬された。

ko.Holy Trinity, Coventry, Warwick, Warwick: 영국 잉글랜드 워윅실르 커븐트리 홀이 트리니티 c후르치
ko.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Wilson(이)가 1557년 1월 영국 워스스터실르 채데슬리 코벳에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Thomas Wilson(은)는 38세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Joanna Hicks(은)는 25세였다. 그녀는 1579년 4월 26일 영국 잉글랜드 워윅실르 커븐트리 홀이 트리니티 c후르치에서 Edward Griffin(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1629년 3월 4일 영국 잉글랜드 워윅실르 솔이훌에서 72세의 나이로 사망했으며 오스트레일리아 뉴 소우스 월스 펜리스에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Elizabeth Wilson nasceu em janeiro de 1557, em Chaddesley Corbett, Worcestershire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Thomas Wilson, tinha 38 anos e sua mãe, Joanna Hicks, tinha 25 anos. Ela casou-se com Edward Griffin em 26 de abril de 1579, em Holy Trinity Church, Coventry, Warwickshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 1 filha. Ela faleceu em 4 de março de 1629, em Solihull, Warwickshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 72 anos, e foi sepultada em Penrith, New South Wales, Austrália.

ru.Holy Trinity, Coventry, Warwick, Warwick: холи тринити чурч, ковентри, варвиккшир, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Elizabeth Wilson родилась январь 1557 г. в местности чэддесли корбетт, ворсестиршир, Англия, её отцу по имени Thomas Wilson было 38 лет, а матери, которую звали Joanna Hicks, 25. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Edward Griffin 26 апреля 1579 г. в местности холи тринити чурч, ковентри, варвиккшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 1 дочь. Она умерла 4 марта 1629 г. в местности солихулл, варвиккшир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 72 лет и была похоронена в местности пенрит, ню соут веилесь, Австралия.

Se casó con Edward Griffin el 26 de abril de 1579, en Holy Trinity Church, Coventry, Warwickshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 1 hija. Murió el 4 de marzo de 1629, en Solihull, Warwickshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 72 años, y fue sepultada en Penrith, New South Wales, Australia.
